comments.text: I had a Yellow Perch Sandwich, caught right here from Lake Erie at the Smugglers Wharf. July 4th Fun.

#65) Welcome to Port Rowan, ON! Port Rowan is a lakeside town in Norfolk County, home to 1,357 people (2021). Nestled by Lake Erie near Long Point, it’s known for its small businesses and welcoming vibe.

The Friendly Lake Serpent // A Lake Erie Watersnake (Nerodia sipedon insularum) basks lazily upon the shore, unaware of her importance. As invasive round gobies destroy much of the Great Lakes habitats, Erie watersnakes shift their diet in preference to these invaders, keeping the invasion at bay.

my opinion that doesn't matter: Dreissenid mussel invasion has fundamentally shifted Great Lakes ecosystems. In most of Lake MI, it's now a food desert. In W Lake Erie, Saginaw Bay (Huron), and Green Bay, this means algae blooms. So Green Bay is a food oasis in Lk MI. But maybe it's junk food?
